verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — no outcome variable loaded; missing: ['bls:cpi_services_subindex', 'bls:ces_state_employment']
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if both (a) panel-FE coefficient on licensing intensity is positive and significant at p<0.05 on services CPI growth, AND (b) the coefficient on licensed-sector employment share is negative and significant at p<0.10 (mechanism check). PARTIAL if only (a) holds. REFUTED if (a) is wrong-signed at p<0.05 or insignificant. INFORMATIVE: the coefficient should be larger when restricted to 2015-2022 (better-measured licensing data); if it shrinks substantially in that window, the headline result is partly an artefact of the noisy historical series.
